Arcade Effects Library

Every effect ships as a utility class in tokens-arcade.css. Drop on any element.

Neon typography

.fx-neon-text + cyan
CUBI
.fx-neon-text
neon flicker
PLAY
.fx-neon-flicker
neon pulse
HIGH SCORE
.fx-neon-pulse
rgb shiver
CUBI FRONTEND
.fx-rgb-shiver
rainbow sweep
ARCADE
.fx-rainbow-text
press start blink
PRESS START
.fx-press-start

CRT & phosphor

.fx-crt wrap
READY  PLAYER 1_
.fx-crt
scanline sweep
SCAN LIBRARY
.fx-scanline-sweep
boot-up animation
CUBI BOOT ◂
.fx-crt-boot

Buttons with motion

arcade pillborder + glow hover
shine sweep.fx-shine
chrome gold--chrome-gold

Motion & physicality

coin / neon pulse
$
.fx-neon-pulse
tilt breathe
MARIO 64
.fx-tilt-breathe
marquee scroll
◂ ◂ NOW PLAYING · SUPER MARIO 64 · N64 · 1996 · PLAYED 47× · HIGH SCORE 120 STARS ▸ ▸
marquee-scroll

Focus sparks (attract mode)

spark-float + random dx
